title: file_search
description: Recursively search file contents by pattern and return matched lines with file paths and line numbers.

pattern.description: Search pattern (regular expression or literal string).

root_dir.description: Root directory to search from. Must be within allowed directories.

file_glob.description: Glob pattern to filter files by name (e.g. '*.go', '*.md').

max_results.description: Maximum number of matched lines to return.
